planning_summary.project_goal: Prove the declaration-only agent-native initialization flow through template creation and build-pack materialization.
planning_summary.new_template_rationale: Create a bounded proving-ground template for the new agent-native initialization declaration flow.
planning_summary.initial_benchmark_intent: Confirm the starter template validates and runs its smoke benchmark.
expected_build_pack_variants: agent-native declaration inherited into a build-pack
agent-native declaration forced off at materialization
planning_summary.first_materialization_purpose: Materialize a smoke build-pack that activates the declaration and proves the resulting manifests and startup surfaces.

agent_native_project_profile_selection.selection_reason: This proving-ground line should declare the tracker-backed agent-native posture from initialization.
